response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to Drift

## Live Chat & Messaging
- **Intercom** - Similar features, often more affordable
- **Zendesk Chat** - Basic plan starts lower
- **Tidio** - Budget-friendly with AI chatbot
- **Crisp** - Pay-as-you-go pricing
- **LiveChat** - Competitive pricing for small teams
- **Freshchat** - Lower entry cost, Freshworks ecosystem

## AI Chatbot-First Options
- **Chatbase** - Affordable AI chatbots
- **Landbot** - No-code builder, cheaper plans
- **ManyChat** - Great for multi-channel (SMS, WhatsApp)
- **Voiceflow** - Design-focused, scalable pricing

## Open Source/Self-Hosted
- **Chatwoot** - Free, open-source alternative
- **Botpress** - Self-hosted option available
- **Rasa** - Developer-friendly, customizable

## Browser-Based Chat Widgets
- **Acquire** - Affordable live chat
- **JivoChat** - Free and paid tiers
- **Olark** - Simple pricing model

## Best For Different Needs
| Use Case | Pick |
|----------|------|
| **Startups** | Tidio, JivoChat |
| **High volume** | Intercom, Zendesk |
| **AI priority** | Chatbase, Botpress |
| **Budget-conscious** | Chatwoot (free), Crisp |

**Tip:** Most offer free trials—test 2-3 before committing.
